title: stelis grossilabris
intro: Stelis grossilabris is a species of orchid native to tropical regions, particularly in Central and South America, known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Stelis grossilabris include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and congestion, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Stelis grossilabris are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves or roots in hot water or alcohol to create teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
